steps.name: Note card with title "Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-1" should be visible getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-1' }).first()
Note card with title "Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-2" should be visible getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-2' }).first()
Note card with title "Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-3" should be visible getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-3' }).first()
Scroll into view getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-1' }).first()
Dispatch "click" getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-1' }).first().getByRole('checkbox', { includeHidden: true })

Checkbox for note "Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-1" should be checked getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-1' }).first().getByRole('checkbox', { includeHidden: true })
Scroll into view getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-2' }).first()
Dispatch "click" getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-2' }).first().getByRole('checkbox', { includeHidden: true })

Checkbox for note "Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-2" should be checked getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-2' }).first().getByRole('checkbox', { includeHidden: true })
Scroll into view getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-3' }).first()
Dispatch "click" getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-3' }).first().getByRole('checkbox', { includeHidden: true })

Checkbox for note "Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-3" should be checked getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Bulk delete note 1784795186570-d8c451-3' }).first().getByRole('checkbox', { includeHidden: true })
Accessibility scan on "Selection Mode" should have no violations
"Delete" action should show 3 selected notes getByTestId('selection-mode-delete')
Bulk delete dialog should be visible getByTestId('bulk-delete-dialog')
Bulk delete dialog title should be visible getByTestId('bulk-delete-dialog').getByRole('heading', { name: 'Delete selected notes' })
Accessibility scan on "Bulk Delete Dialog" should have no violations
confirm bulk deletion
Confirm button should be enabled after entering correct count getByTestId('bulk-delete-confirm')
Bulk delete dialog should be hidden after confirmation getByTestId('bulk-delete-dialog')
